headline: 3 Reasons AOS is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the past six months, A. O. Smith’s stock price fell to $57.98. Shareholders have lost 8.4% of their capital, which is disappointing considering the S&P 500 has climbed by 11.5%. This was partly driven by its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.
